systemAnalysis.systemImpact: This change will throttle Mautic's email sending by spooling messages to the filesystem and processing only 50 per batch. This is a configuration change within the running `mautic-app` Docker container and will take effect after clearing the application cache. No downtime is expected, but email throughput will be intentionally reduced.

executionSteps.description: Back up the current 'local.php' configuration file inside the container.
Set 'mailer_spool_type' to 'file'. This command finds the line and replaces it. It assumes the key already exists.
Set 'mailer_spool_msg_limit' to 50. This command finds the line and replaces it. It assumes the key already exists.
Clear the Mautic application cache for the changes to take effect.

rollbackPlan: Find the latest backup file: `BACKUP_FILE=$(docker exec "$CONTAINER_ID" ls /var/www/html/config/ | grep local.php.bak | sort -r | head -n 1)`
Clear the Mautic cache: `docker exec "$CONTAINER_ID" php /var/www/html/bin/console mautic:cache:clear --env=prod`
